description: gas_pressure returns P0*V0/(V0 + A*d) — pressure drops as the gas expands
air_muzzle_velocity uses (P - PATM)*A each step so the dart accelerates then decelerates once below atmospheric
best_barrel tries barrel lengths and keeps the one with the highest muzzle velocity (the sweet spot)
Subtracts atmospheric pressure so a too-long barrel correctly comes out slower
